summary: Audience recording of a bittersweet 1995 show, highlighted by Same Thing/China>Rider and a Spanish Jam even as Jerry’s health was waning.
review: Fans remember this concert for its emotional weight and a few standout moments – the tight Same Thing into China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider sequence, a breezy Spanish jam and an uplifting Eyes of the World.  The tape is an audience (AUD) source that “holds up,” but listeners note Jerry’s exhausted playing and a weak Wharf Rat, giving the show a mixed musical impression.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is average‑to‑good with several praised songs but notable performance issues; recording is an audience tape that is acceptable but not pristine, leading to a combined rating around the low‑mid 3s.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience (AUD) source; listeners say it “holds up” despite wishing for a soundboard, no major clarity complaints noted.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: Setlist remembered fondly with strong transitions on the highlighted numbers, but overall energy is uneven due to Jerry’s deteriorating condition.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeated references to his exhaustion and rough playing; fans note he gave his best despite looking unwell.
